creator: rsimmons@mail.wlcg.com
text:
The pid file for openldap was moved to /var/db/slapd.pid it should be in
/var/run/slapd.pid.  Also, the rc.d script refers to the old location,
/var/run/slapd.pid

Fix: 

Change the line in the default config file.
How-To-Repeat: Install the port and look at /usr/local/etc/openldap/slapd.conf.default
